title: geranium elatum
intro: Geranium elatum, also known as the Alpine geranium, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Geranium elatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Geranium elatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
